purpose: Specs for generator, assembler, config, project_runner, validator, exporter

generator.purpose: Orchestrates 4-stage pipeline. Only module that calls providers.

public_api.generate: async def generate(idea: str, config: Config, provider: BaseProvider) -> UseCaseDocument
public_api.docstring:
Run full 4-stage pipeline.

Args:
    idea: Natural language from user.
    config: Loaded Config.
    provider: Availability-checked provider.

Returns:
    UseCaseDocument with raw_markdown set.

Raises:
    ProviderUnavailableError: If provider unavailable.
    GenerationError: If any non-fallback stage fails.

assembler.purpose: Pure Python Jinja2 renderer. No LLM. Returns final markdown string including YAML frontmatter.

public_api.assemble: def assemble(intake: IntakeResult, sections: SectionsResult, entities: EntitiesResult, config: Config) -> str
public_api.docstring:
Render Jinja2 template with all pipeline results.

Returns:
    Full markdown string with YAML frontmatter block at top.

Raises:
    AssemblerError: If Jinja2 rendering fails.

assembler.frontmatter_note: The YAML frontmatter block is generated by assembler, not by the LLM. It is derived from the Pydantic models deterministically.
assembler.template_resolution: config.template is a string name -> loads ucgen/templates/{name}.md.j2. Or an absolute Path.

config.purpose: Loads .ucgenrc.toml project-then-home. Returns typed Config object.
config.load_function: def load(project_dir: Path | None = None) -> Config

project_runner.purpose: Reads ucgen.yaml and orchestrates multi-use-case generation runs. Tier 2 feature.

public_api.name: load_project
public_api.docstring:
Load and validate ucgen.yaml.

Raises:
    ImportError: If PyYAML not installed.
    FileNotFoundError: If ucgen.yaml missing.
    ValidationError: If YAML invalid against ProjectDefinition.

public_api.name: run_project
public_api.signature: async def run_project(project: ProjectDefinition, config: Config, provider: BaseProvider, filter_id: str | None = None, filter_tag: str | None = None) -> list[UseCaseDocument]
public_api.docstring: Generate use cases from project definition with optional filtering.

public_api.name: get_project_status
public_api.signature: def get_project_status(project: ProjectDefinition, output_dir: Path) -> list[dict]
public_api.docstring: Check which use cases exist in output_dir. Returns list of {id, title, status, generated_at, file_path}.

validator.purpose: Validates existing .md use case files against ucgen schema.

public_api.docstring:
Parse and validate a .md use case file.

Returns:
    ValidationResult with per-section pass/fail and error messages.
validation_checks: YAML frontmatter parseable and contains required fields
entities section present with at least one entity

exporter.purpose: Converts UseCaseDocument to JSON or YAML string.
